editions.name: The Lilac Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Lilac Edition brings out the delicate and refreshing sweetness of Pink Grapefruit, combined with the unique flavor of Woodruff

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated by top athletes, busy professionals, university students and travelers on long journeys

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Wings without sugar. Red Bull Energy Drink Sugarfree is the sugarfree version of Red Bull Energy Drink

editions.name: The Peach Edition
editions.flavor_description: Sweet White Peach flavor, emitting a faint fresh citrus peel and floral fragrance
editions.alt_text: Red Bull White Peach Edition Sugarfree half can

editions.name: The Purple Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Purple Edition instantly bursts with the unique and tempting taste of giant grapes, with a sweet and sour flavor that hits the taste buds directly
